CONNECTION.DESCRIPTION: Oracle GPC_DM schema — EDWH Framework target and log tables

PROPERTY.NAME: username
PROPERTY.DESCRIPTION: Schema owner with EXECUTE on all PKG_ETL_* packages and SELECT on ETL_RUN_LOG, ETL_STEP_LOG, ETL_ERROR_LOG.

PROPERTY.NAME: password
PROPERTY.DESCRIPTION: Store in IICS secure parameter store — never hardcode.

PROPERTY.NAME: jdbcDriverClass
PROPERTY.DESCRIPTION: ojdbc8.jar or ojdbc11.jar required on the Secure Agent. Copy to: $INFA_HOME/services/shared/javalib/

PROPERTY.NAME: connectionTimeout
PROPERTY.DESCRIPTION: Seconds before a new connection attempt times out.

PROPERTY.NAME: queryTimeout
PROPERTY.DESCRIPTION: Max seconds a single SQL task may run (1 hour). Increase for initial full loads.

PROPERTY.NAME: runtimeEnvironment
PROPERTY.DESCRIPTION: Name of the Secure Agent group installed in the same network zone as the Oracle database.
